page_title: Corporate Culture & Social Responsibility - MyuTech MicroMyu

hero.title: Corporate Culture
hero.sub: Into the Future Domain — Break boundaries with innovation, shape tomorrow with technology

brand.story_title: MyuTech MicroMyu — Meaning of the Name
brand.text1: "Mai" (迈): means "stride, leap, advance"—a spirit of innovation, progress, and breaking limits. In a tech context, it symbolizes "striding into the future" and "crossing technological frontiers."
brand.text2: "Yu" (域): means "domain, territory, space"—often used for "digital domain" or "intelligent domain" in tech, representing new spaces for technology and new frontiers of the world.
brand.highlight_line1: "Stride into New Domains" — continuously expanding technological frontiers
brand.highlight_line2: "Enter the Future Domain" — a spirit of exploration and innovation for the future
brand.text3: Myu (迈域): its pronunciation echoes μ (micro/myu), aligning with "Micro Technology" and "μ-Intelligence" (intelligent innovation).

items.title: Innovation-Driven
items.desc: We make technological innovation our core advantage, explore frontiers, and transform research into real-world applications to lead industry change.

items.title: Beyond Boundaries
items.desc: We break technical and industry silos, integrating AI, XR, IoT and more to create cross-domain intelligent solutions.

items.title: Pursuit of Excellence
items.desc: We insist on top quality—refining every detail from product design to service delivery to ensure reliability and great user experience.

items.title: Customer First
items.desc: We are needs-driven, delivering tailored solutions, growing with customers, and creating measurable business value.

items.title: Open Collaboration
items.desc: We build an open ecosystem and work closely with partners, developers, and academia to share knowledge and co-create the future.

items.title: Sustainability
items.desc: We balance innovation with environmental protection, promote green computing, and align economic returns with social responsibility.

cards.label: Innovation Climate
cards.title: Encourage exploration, tolerate trial & error
cards.desc: We foster a free and innovative environment and encourage bold ideas. With dedicated Innovation Time, engineers explore frontier tech. Failure is part of innovation—we learn and continuously improve.

cards.label: Learning & Growth
cards.title: Keep learning, grow together
cards.desc: We offer comprehensive training and resources—tech talks, conferences, online courses, and mentorship. We support open-source and academic work, staying connected to the global tech community.

cards.label: Work–Life Balance
cards.title: Care for well-being
cards.desc: We implement flexible schedules and remote work, respect personal time, and provide health checks, counseling, and team activities so everyone finds a healthy balance.
